data.name: No Such Luck
data.detailed_description:
No Such Luck tells the story of a young man who enters college after years of living on his own. He won the lottery, he got engaged - and then it all fell apart. Now ready to rejoin the world - reconnect with old friends, make new ones, all while trying to come to terms with the past. Of course college life comes with it's own set of challenges - sometimes, everything goes your way. Other times? No Such Luck.

No Such Luck contains a wide cast of characters. Your choices help shape the state of the world and the MC.

Current Contents:

Episode one consists of multiple hours of gameplay per playthrough, and follows the story over 4 total chapters:

No Such Luck contains multiple easy to navigate freeroam events, a fully functional phone that updates with new apps and functionality throughout the course of the game, a dynamic biographies section to keep up to date with all characters, and more.

Episode one boasts over 10k total images, dozens of animations, and almost 200 uniquely scored music tracks.

Throughout the Story you'll meet a whole host of characters - some important, and some just for fun! Included in the phone is a dynamic in-game biographies section which constantly updates info about those characters based on your progress.

No Such Luck will continue to be updated as new Chapters and Episodes are released!

data.short_description: As a young man, he left home immediately after high school, and has spent the last two years alone. He is finally ready to re-enter the world, ready to join his friends in college. Will it be drugs, sex and rock'n'roll? Or did he never truly get over what happened?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or newer
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or newer
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

Minimum:
  • OS: 10.6 or newer
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
